exclusion_policy: These rows are retained as support/public/stress evidence and cannot change the 300-row live audit numerator or denominator.
join_policy: Support/public/stress rows can be cited as auxiliary evidence only when every table clearly separates them from the 300 claim-bearing DeepSeek live denominator.

support_categories.exclusion_reason: Rows do not satisfy the frozen DeepSeek live CodeDyeBench claim contract.
